'''dzhabhoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:bird|bird]]". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dzh-bh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bird|bird]]
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dzhabhoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dzhæbhereth|dzhæbhereth]] || [[word:dzhæbherej|dzhæbherej]] || [[word:dzhæbheresh|dzhæbheresh]] || [[word:dzhæbhere|dzhæbhere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dzhabhobhoroth|dzhabhobhoroth]] || [[word:dzhabhobhoroj|dzhabhobhoroj]] || [[word:dzhabhobhorosh|dzhabhobhorosh]] || [[word:dzhabhobhoro|dzhabhobhoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dzhabhoroth|dzhabhoroth]] || [[word:dzhabhoroj|dzhabhoroj]] || [[word:dzhabhorosh|dzhabhorosh]] || [[word:dzhabhoro|dzhabhoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dzhabhofrofth|dzhabhofrofth]] || [[word:dzhabhofrofj|dzhabhofrofj]] || [[word:dzhabhofrofsh|dzhabhofrofsh]] || [[word:dzhabhofrof|dzhabhofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dzhabhorotho|dzhabhorotho]] || [[word:dzhabhorojo|dzhabhorojo]] || [[word:dzhabhorosho|dzhabhorosho]] || [[word:dzhabhoroko|dzhabhoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dzhabhoroth|dzhabhoroth]] || [[word:dzhabhoroj|dzhabhoroj]] || [[word:dzhabhorosh|dzhabhorosh]] || [[word:dzhabhoro|dzhabhoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dzhabhorothol|dzhabhorothol]] || [[word:dzhabhorojol|dzhabhorojol]] || [[word:dzhabhoroshol|dzhabhoroshol]] || [[word:dzhabhorokol|dzhabhorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dzhabhoroothotho|dzhabhoroothotho]] || [[word:dzhabhoroojojo|dzhabhoroojojo]] || [[word:dzhabhorooshosho|dzhabhorooshosho]] || [[word:dzhabhorooko|dzhabhorooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dzhabhorothon|dzhabhorothon]] || [[word:dzhabhorojon|dzhabhorojon]] || [[word:dzhabhoroshon|dzhabhoroshon]] || [[word:dzhabhorokon|dzhabhorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dzhabhorothooro|dzhabhorothooro]] || [[word:dzhabhorojooro|dzhabhorojooro]] || [[word:dzhabhoroshooro|dzhabhoroshooro]] || [[word:dzhabhorokooro|dzhabhorokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1da9d54}}
